item.title: About
item.description: My name is Mazen Mel I have an engineering degree in telecommunications from The Higher School of Communications of Tunis (Tunisia) and I am currently working towards my master’s degree in ICT for Internet and Multimedia at The University of Padova (Italy).

item.title: Contact
item.description: Feel free to send me any requests or comments here.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Academic Projects Network Science Analysis of the trust network of Bitcoin-Alpha exchange platform.
